ddls:
CREATE TABLE "banks" (
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the bank is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the bank operates */,
  "certification" INTEGER /* Certification number of the bank */,
  "acquiring_institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the acquiring institution during closure, if applicable */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date when the bank was closed, if applicable */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the bank record was last updated */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the bank was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the bank */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the bank */,
  "total_deposits" REAL /* Total deposits of the bank */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the bank */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the bank */,
  "last_audited_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_banks_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_banks_acquiring_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("acquiring_institution_id") REFERENCES acquiring_institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acquiring_institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acquiring institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the acquiring institution */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the institution */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the acquiring institution was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the acquiring institution */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the acquiring institution */,
  "total_deposits" REAL /* Total deposits of the acquiring institution */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the acquiring institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the acquiring institution */,
  "last_audited_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state code */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank whose status is being recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the bank (e.g., Active, Closed) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was recorded */,
  "reason_for_status_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change in the bank's status */,
  "next_audit_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bank_status_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank that was audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit took place */,
  "auditor_name" TEXT /* Name of the auditor who conducted the audit */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Notes or findings from the audit */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit (e.g., Financial, Compliance) */,
  "audit_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the audit */,
  "audit_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the audit (e.g., Annual, Bi-Annual) */,
  "audit_result" TEXT /* Result of the audit (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_audits_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification record */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank being certified */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification was granted */,
  "certifying_body" TEXT /* Name of the body that granted the certification */,
  "certification_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the certification */,
  "certification_status" TEXT /* Status of the certification (e.g., Active, Expired) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification is due for renewal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bank_certifications_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Auditor, Analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Level of access (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for intermediate, 3 for advanced) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role within the agency */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_password_change_date" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Deposit, Withdrawal) */,
  "transaction_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transaction */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Completed, Pending, Reversed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bank_transactions_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branch_offices ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bank_transactions_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branch_offices" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch office */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank to which the branch belongs */,
  "branch_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the branch office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the branch */,
  "branch_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch manager */,
  "branch_manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the branch manager */,
  "branch_manager_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the branch manager */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the branch opened */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "branch_type" TEXT /* Type of branch (e.g., Main, Satellite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branch_offices_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)
